full_text:
Xia Yun 夏暉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xia Yun (夏暉). One of the Ten Regular Attendants, greatly favoured by Dowager Dong and Emperor Ling. Xia Yun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Xia Yun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
